title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
